summary: Matched a broad set of mn/menu record-related functions across count rows, VS stat diagrams, name entry, vibration, rule-plus, data delete, special info, snapshots, and sound test. The decomp-dev report recorded 21 new matches, +7344 matched code bytes, and +624 matched data bytes; the PR body lists verification with `python configure.py --require-protos && ninja`.

key_files.role: Largest change; matched mnVibration_80248444, mnVibration_80248644, mnVibration_80248ED4, mnVibration_80249174 and mnvibration data by adding MnVibrationDataLayout, assert strings, name-slot helpers, and indexed asset loading.

Matched mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, mnInfo_802522B8 and improved adjacent functions using MnInfoDataLayout, date/time format data, text-slot pointer arithmetic, count helper, and adjusted inlining/stack padding.
Matched mn_80232D4C and improved mn_80233218/data by making rule stat/description tables explicit, adding SisLib_ClearText and mnRulePlus_GetDescIdx, and promoting constants/sdata.
Matched mnDiagram2_GetStatValue and mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows with u16 temporary stat returns, default return shaping, HSD_GObjGetUserData, and MnDiagram2DataLayout for arrow animation data.
Matched AddCharacterToName and mnNameNew_8023E0D8 with MnNameNewDataLayout overlaying animation, key JObj IDs, character bytes, and glyph tables.
Matched mnCount_GetRowValue_Character and improved mnCount_GetRowValue_Number by factoring unlocked character/map counting into static inline helpers.
Matched mnDataDel_80250170 by introducing archive/assets locals and addressing StaticModelDesc assets as an array in lbArchive_LoadSections.
Matched mnSnap_80253BE0 and fn_80257D7C through cursor/local reshaping and HSD_Text pointer-offset cleanup loops.
Matched mnSoundTest_8024A790 by reordering locals and interleaving L/R trigger multiplication over HSD_PadCopyStatus entries.
Adjusted mnDiagram stat helper prototypes and casts, including MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE guarded header behavior.
Updated prototypes/externs in mnvibration.h, mndiagram.h, mninfo.h, mnruleplus.h, and mnnamenew.h to match new signatures and exposed data symbols.

what_changed: Matched the PR-listed functions: mn_80232D4C, AddCharacterToName, mnNameNew_8023E0D8, mnDiagram2_GetStatValue, mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows, mnVibration_80248444, mnVibration_80248644, mnVibration_80248ED4, mnVibration_80249174, mnSoundTest_8024A790, mnDataDel_80250170, mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, mnInfo_802522B8, mnSnap_80253BE0, fn_80257D7C, and mnCount_GetRowValue_Character.

decomp-dev reported 21 new matches, including mnvibration .data to 100%, mnruleplus .sdata to 100%, mnvibration .sdata to 100%, mninfo .sdata2 improvement, and six additional unmatched-item improvements.

mnCount gained static inline mnCount_CountUnlockedChars and mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps; SHORTEST_TIME and AVAILABLE_CHARACTERS/AVAILABLE_MAPS now reuse those helpers and mnCount_GetRowValue_Number no longer needs the old PAD_STACK(8).

mnDiagram/mnDiagram2 changed stat mode handling: some helper prototypes now take int at call boundaries while comparing `(u8) is_name_mode`; mnDiagram2_GetStatValue uses a u16 val16 temporary for several 16-bit stats and returns is_name_mode on the default path.
mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows now uses HSD_GObjGetUserData and a MnDiagram2DataLayout overlay so the arrow animation setting is accessed as base->anim[1] instead of a standalone array symbol.

mnNameNew introduced MnNameNewDataLayout to access animation settings, key JObj IDs, character bytes, lower glyphs, and upper glyphs from one packed layout; AddCharacterToName and mnNameNew_8023E0D8 were rewritten around that layout.

mnInfo introduced MnInfoDataLayout over mnInfo_803EFC08 so date_format and time_format come from data; mnInfo_80251D58 gained an extra u32 argument for the saved date value, and text columns are addressed with explicit HSD_Text** slot arithmetic.

mnRulePlus converted mn_803ED2E8 from a zeroed 16x2 array into a structured stat/desc table, added reusable text clearing and description-index helpers, and moved font/position literals into named const f32 symbols exported by the header.

mnVibration added a large MnVibrationDataLayout for animation settings, name position, assert strings, and archive section names; functions now use helper wrappers for name slot and rumble data, indexed asset arrays, HSD_JObjGetChild, and HSD_GObjProc flags.
mnDataDel_80250170 and mnVibration_80249174 both shifted lbArchive_LoadSections calls toward local archive/assets pointers and array indexing of StaticModelDesc-like asset blocks.

mnSnap cleanup logic changed from direct global field references to `snap`-based pointer loops over HSD_Text arrays; mnSoundTest_8024A790 changed floating-point multiplication ordering for controller trigger values.

Headers were updated for changed prototypes and externs, including mnVibration_80248644 returning void, mnNameNew_MainInput returning void, mnInfo_80251D58 taking four parameters, and mnDiagram's guarded source/external prototype split.
smart_moves: Used local typed layout overlays for packed static data instead of scattering separate externs; this made heterogeneous blobs searchable while preserving the offsets needed for matching.

Factored repeated logic into static inline helpers only where it helped codegen: unlocked character/map counts, unlocked trophy count, vibration name slot resolution, rule-plus description lookup, and SisLib text cleanup.
Preserved original narrow-type behavior by keeping wider int parameters where needed and explicitly casting to u8 at branch points, especially around is_name_mode and selected menu indices.

Replaced raw or direct object access with engine helpers where codegen wanted them, such as HSD_GObjGetUserData, HSD_JObjGetChild, and assigning HSD_GObjProc::flags_3 instead of editing a GObj flag byte.
Pulled format strings, archive section names, font sizes, and position constants out of call sites into data-backed fields/constants so the code and data sections could both improve.
Used temporaries like u16 val16 in mnDiagram2_GetStatValue and local archive/assets/layout pointers in LoadSections-heavy functions to force the desired register/control-flow shape.
Kept matching pragmas and stack controls targeted: `#pragma dont_inline`, `#pragma auto_inline off`, and adjusted PAD_STACK sizes appear only around functions that needed them.
decomp_lessons: mn menu files often have packed static-data regions containing a mix of AnimLoopSettings, strings, IDs, glyph tables, and floats; defining a local `*DataLayout` struct over the base symbol is a reusable way to expose those fields without inventing unrelated globals.
For decomp matching, a helper can be an asset rather than a readability-only refactor when it creates the same call/inline pattern across adjacent switch cases.
When a boolean-like argument is passed as an int but semantically treated as a byte, keep the ABI-facing int and add explicit `(u8)` comparisons instead of narrowing every prototype.

Header prototypes may need source-only guards when the defining translation unit and external call sites require different apparent signatures for matching; this PR used MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE for that case.
Data matches can depend on literal suffixes and storage qualifiers: examples include -0.1F in mndatadel.static.h and volatile/const f32/f64 symbols in mnruleplus.
Archive loading code often matches better when consecutive StaticModelDesc globals are treated as an indexed asset array and the archive pointer is saved in a local before lbArchive_LoadSections.
Text UI cleanup in mn code may require pointer arithmetic over user_data rather than clean field access; this appears in mnInfo text columns and mnSnap HSD_Text cleanup loops.
Do not assume PAD_STACK should stay: several matches removed or resized stack padding after introducing natural locals, while mnInfo and mnSoundTest still needed targeted PAD_STACK values.

For HSD assert/string data, include order and local HSD_ASSERT macro definitions can matter; mnvibration temporarily redefined HSD_ASSERT around baselib/jobj.h to recover the expected jobj assert strings.
naming_conventions: New layout typedefs use PascalCase module names with a `DataLayout` suffix: MnVibrationDataLayout, MnNameNewDataLayout, MnDiagram2DataLayout, and MnInfoDataLayout.

Small local helpers use a module prefix plus verb/object name, such as mnCount_CountUnlockedChars, mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps, mnInfo_CountUnlocked, mnVibration_GetNameSlot, mnVibration_GetNameRumble, and mnRulePlus_GetDescIdx.
Generic library-oriented helpers can be named by subsystem behavior when local to a module, as with SisLib_ClearText for clearing HSD_Text pointers.
Unidentified functions and data continue to preserve address-style labels such as mnVibration_80248ED4, mn_80232D4C, fn_80257D7C, mn_803ED2E8, and mn_804DBE4C.
Structured overlays can add meaningful field names while keeping the original base symbol, e.g. mn_803ED2E8.stat/desc and layout->date_format/time_format.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Overlay packed data with local structs and cast the original symbol address, e.g. `(MnVibrationDataLayout*) &mnVibration_803EECE0`, `(MnNameNewDataLayout*) mnNameNew_803EDA58`, `(MnDiagram2DataLayout*) &mnDiagram2_803EEAD0`, and `(MnInfoDataLayout*) mnInfo_803EFC08`.
Use `#pragma dont_inline on` and `#pragma auto_inline off` around sensitive functions such as mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, and mnInfo_802522B8.
Shape 16-bit loads/returns in mnDiagram2_GetStatValue by assigning branch results to a u16 temporary before returning.
Preserve byte semantics with explicit casts like `(u8) is_name_mode`, `(u8) i`, and `(s32) (u8) name_idx` instead of changing all involved variables to u8.
Use local pointer variables for archive/assets/layout before long lbArchive_LoadSections calls to influence register allocation and make contiguous asset data apparent.
Replace direct `gobj->user_data` in one matched path with HSD_GObjGetUserData and direct child access with HSD_JObjGetChild where the original codegen expected helper calls.
Promote literals into const/volatile data symbols to affect .sdata/.sdata2 matching, especially in mnruleplus font/position constants and f64 conversion constants.
For sound-test float codegen, interleave L-trigger and R-trigger products across HSD_PadCopyStatus[0..3] rather than computing each product as one expression.
For HSD_Text arrays, pointer-offset loops such as `slot += 2`, `slot += 6`, `text_p[0x3E]`, and `text_p[0x42]` can be necessary to match user_data layout traversal.
Use `--require-protos` verification to catch prototype drift after signature changes in headers.
review_feedback: No formal human reviews or review comments were present in the provided slice.
The decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 showed matched code 69.61% (+0.19%, +7344 bytes) and matched data 41.25% (+0.05%, +624 bytes), with 21 new matches and 6 improvements in unmatched items.
The author commented: `cleaning up regressions now. will mark ready once report is clean`; the slice does not include the earlier regression details, only the later positive report.
The PR body lists verification as `python configure.py --require-protos && ninja`.
follow_up_queries: rg "volatile const f64|volatile f32|const f32" src/melee/mn/mnruleplus.c src/melee/mn -n
